extension.description: littleduck is a custom Kodi skin built on Estuary with a Netflix-inspired dark theme, duck gold accents, and deep integration with TMDb Helper and Rabitewatch. Designed for a clean, curated home screen experience.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

littleduck is a custom Kodi skin built on Estuary with a Netflix-inspired dark theme, duck gold accents, and deep integration with TMDb Helper and Rabitewatch. Designed for a clean, curated home screen experience.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

littleduck is a custom Kodi skin built on Estuary with a Netflix-inspired dark theme, duck gold accents, and deep integration with TMDb Helper and Rabitewatch. Designed for a clean, curated home screen experience.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.
